---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Foncier

Nous allons charger les données concernant le foncier des ménages des OR Alaotra et Marovoay.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library (gt) # Easily create presentation - ready display tables

# Loading observatories data
res_deb <- read_dta("data/res_deb.dta")
# Loading household data
res_m_a <- read_dta("data/res_m_a.dta")

# Loading land data
res_fr30 <- read_dta("data/res_fr30.dta") # year, j5
res_fr30a <- read_dta("data/res_fr30a.dta") # year, j5
res_fr33 <- read_dta("data/res_fr33.dta") # year, j5
res_fr34 <- read_dta("data/res_fr34.dta") # year, j5

```
